description: Before building the loop/pipeline, all four fields (gate condition, stop condition, token budget, separate verifier) were explicitly named in the loop spec or brief.
loop_lint.py was executed on the loop spec and exited with code 0, confirming structural validity before the loop began execution.
The actor that checks/verifies loop outputs is a different entity than the actor that produces them; no self-grading or self-validation within the same agent step.
Subagent briefs included goal, in-scope, out-of-scope, and the GATE block (either as structured brief or via brief_header.py invocation) so subagents knew what outputs pass/fail.
